rows.flag_title: Newly disclosed exclusion of Hanes (approximately 45% of net sales and a majority of the combined balance sheet) from the scope of ICFR and disclosure controls evaluation creates a significant control-assurance gap during the critical post-acquisition integration period
rows.quote: As disclosed in our 2025 Annual MD&A, we have limited the scope of our evaluation of internal controls over financial reporting (ICFR) to exclude controls over financial reporting of Hanes, a subsidiary acquired by the Company in connection with an acquisition consummated on December 1, 2025. In addition, we have also limited the scope of our evaluation of disclosure controls and procedures (DC&P) to exclude disclosure controls and procedures of Hanes.
rows.claimed_location: Exhibit 99.1 (Q1 2026 MD&A), Section 13.0 "Internal Control Over Financial Reporting"

rows.flag_title: Newly disclosed exclusion of Hanes (approximately 45% of net sales and a majority of the combined balance sheet) from the scope of ICFR and disclosure controls evaluation creates a significant control-assurance gap during the critical post-acquisition integration period
rows.quote: The net sales originating from the financial records of Hanes which were included in the condensed interim consolidated results of the Company for the three month period ended March 29, 2026 represented approximately 45% of total net sales. Hanes accounted for approximately $2,313 million of current assets, $3,809 million of non-current assets, $986 million of current liabilities, and $1,703 million of non-current liabilities, in the Company's condensed interim consolidated statement of financial position as at March 29, 2026.
rows.claimed_location: Exhibit 99.1 (Q1 2026 MD&A), Section 13.0 "Internal Control Over Financial Reporting"

rows.flag_title: Newly disclosed exclusion of Hanes (approximately 45% of net sales and a majority of the combined balance sheet) from the scope of ICFR and disclosure controls evaluation creates a significant control-assurance gap during the critical post-acquisition integration period
rows.quote: Restructuring and acquisition-related costs for the three months ended March 29, 2026 primarily reflect expenses associated with the integration of Hanes. These costs include $27.1 million for severance and other related charges...and $14.5 million for the write-off of equipment related to these facility closures.

rows.flag_title: Net debt leverage ratio disclosure inconsistency has widened rather than narrowed: reported non-GAAP leverage of 3.3x now diverges by a full 0.5 turn from the leverage ratio used under U.S. private placement note covenants (3.8x)
rows.quote: Gildan's net debt leverage ratio as at March 29, 2026 was 3.3 times (3.0 times at December 28, 2025).
rows.claimed_location: Exhibit 99.1 (Q1 2026 MD&A), Section 8.2 "Long-term debt and net debt and net debt leverage ratio"

rows.flag_title: Net debt leverage ratio disclosure inconsistency has widened rather than narrowed: reported non-GAAP leverage of 3.3x now diverges by a full 0.5 turn from the leverage ratio used under U.S. private placement note covenants (3.8x)
rows.quote: The Company's net debt to EBITDA ratio for purposes of its term loans and revolving facility was 3.4x and for purposes of U.S. private placement notes was 3.8x at March 29, 2026 (3.1x and 3.4x respectively at December 28, 2025).

rows.flag_title: Net debt leverage ratio disclosure inconsistency has widened rather than narrowed: reported non-GAAP leverage of 3.3x now diverges by a full 0.5 turn from the leverage ratio used under U.S. private placement note covenants (3.8x)
rows.quote: Adjusted EBITDA for the trailing twelve months (excluding discontinued operations) (1) | 981.3 | 926.3 ... Business acquisitions(3) | 472.0 | 564.8 ... Pro-forma adjusted EBITDA for the trailing twelve months | 1,453.3 | 1,491.1

rows.flag_title: Net debt leverage ratio disclosure inconsistency has widened rather than narrowed: reported non-GAAP leverage of 3.3x now diverges by a full 0.5 turn from the leverage ratio used under U.S. private placement note covenants (3.8x)
rows.quote: As a result of the closing of the Hanes acquisition, our net debt leverage ratio exceeded our stated target range. Accordingly, we paused our share repurchases starting in August 2025, and we expect share repurchases to resume when the net debt leverage ratio approximates the midpoint of the target range.

rows.flag_title: Receivables-factoring balance swung sharply downward quarter-over-quarter, and management explicitly attributes part of the accounts-receivable increase and cash-flow weakness to reduced use of this off-balance-sheet financing lever, confirming its outsized influence on reported working capital and operating cash flow
rows.quote: As at March 29, 2026, trade accounts receivable being serviced under receivables purchase agreements amounted to $667.3 million (December 28, 2025 - $777.0 million).

rows.flag_title: Receivables-factoring balance swung sharply downward quarter-over-quarter, and management explicitly attributes part of the accounts-receivable increase and cash-flow weakness to reduced use of this off-balance-sheet financing lever, confirming its outsized influence on reported working capital and operating cash flow
rows.quote: The increase in trade accounts receivable (which are net of accrued sales discounts) was mainly due to the impact of higher sales in the first quarter of fiscal 2026 compared to the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, lower sales of trade accounts receivables to financial institutions under receivables purchase agreements, seasonally lower offset for accruals for sales discounts...and partially offset by higher days sales outstanding (DSO) as a result of longer payment terms.
rows.claimed_location: Exhibit 99.1 (Q1 2026 MD&A), Section 6.1 "Current assets and current liabilities"

rows.flag_title: Receivables-factoring balance swung sharply downward quarter-over-quarter, and management explicitly attributes part of the accounts-receivable increase and cash-flow weakness to reduced use of this off-balance-sheet financing lever, confirming its outsized influence on reported working capital and operating cash flow
rows.quote: Accounts payable and accrued liabilities also include balances payable of $39.9 million (December 28, 2025 - $120.1) resulting mainly from a one-week timing difference between the collection of sold receivables and the weekly remittance to the bank counterparty under the receivables purchase agreement

rows.flag_title: Extreme, and now independently corroborated, customer concentration risk persists at the whole-company level, with the largest single customer accounting for roughly a third of total sales and the top ten accounting for nearly three-quarters
rows.quote: Our total customer base is composed of a relatively small number of significant customers. In fiscal 2025, our largest customer accounted for 33.2% of our total sales, and our top ten customers accounted for 72.5% of our total sales.
rows.claimed_location: Form 40-F Exhibit 99.3 (Annual Information Form), "Description of the Business" - Brands, Products, and Customers

rows.quote: Although we have long term ongoing relationships with many of our customers, our contracts with our customers do not require them to purchase a minimum quantity of our products.
rows.claimed_location: Form 40-F Exhibit 99.3 (Annual Information Form), "Description of the Business" - Brands, Products, and Customers

rows.flag_title: Extreme, and now independently corroborated, customer concentration risk persists at the whole-company level, with the largest single customer accounting for roughly a third of total sales and the top ten accounting for nearly three-quarters
rows.quote: On October 1, 2024, the Company's two largest wholesale distributor customers, to which Gildan is a significant supplier, closed a transaction combining their businesses. The combination of these two distributors increased our customer sales concentration with the combined entity to approximately 39% of our fiscal 2024 net sales.
rows.claimed_location: Form 40-F Exhibit 99.3 (Annual Information Form), "General Development of the Business" - Industry Landscape
